title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
